modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a warm and approachable tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be distracting grammar usage and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Course not showing on D2L homepage.

full_description_text: The user is trying to see their course on the D2L homepage, but it is not there. They are confused and need help because they expect to find it easily. It seems like something is not working right with the homepage display.
short_description: Course not showing on D2L homepage.
description: The user is trying to see their course on the D2L homepage, but it is not there. They are confused and need help because they expect to find it easily. It seems like something is not working right with the homepage display.
